src/main.ts.summary: LinterPlugin entry point extending Obsidian Plugin: registers commands, editor/workspace events, save-callback override, settings tab, and orchestrates linting of files, folders, the vault, and paste events.
src/main.ts.inputs: Obsidian App/Editor/TFile/TFolder events, clipboard data, loaded settings JSON, misspelling files.
src/main.ts.outputs: Modified note text written to vault/editor, Notices, migrated settings.
src/main.ts.should: Wire commands/events, delegate text transformation to RulesRunner, diff+dispatch editor changes, handle lint errors, migrate/cleanup settings, manage debounced yaml-timestamp linting.
src/main.ts.shouldNot: Implement individual rule logic or parse markdown/YAML directly.
src/main.ts.side: Obsidian vault/editor mutation, notices, file reads/writes, event registration, localStorage/moment locale, network via auto-correct download.

src/rules.ts.summary: Core Rule and Example classes, RuleType enum, global rule registry (rules array, rulesDict, ruleTypeToRules), plus helpers to register/sort rules, read frontmatter disabled-rules, and wrap lint errors.
src/rules.ts.inputs: Rule metadata (language keys, alias, type, apply fn, options, ignoreTypes), note text for getDisabledRules.
src/rules.ts.outputs: Rule instances, registered rule collections, disabled-rule list, thrown LinterError.
src/rules.ts.should: Define rule abstraction, apply ignore-types before a rule's transform, hold registry, sort by type/key.
src/rules.ts.shouldNot: Perform DOM/UI work or run the full lint pipeline.

src/rules-runner.ts.summary: RulesRunner orchestrates the ordered lint pipeline: before-rules, the main enabled-rule loop, custom regex replacements, after-rules (yaml title/timestamp/keysort), paste-lint, and standalone yaml-timestamp runs.
src/rules-runner.ts.inputs: RunLinterRulesOptions (oldText, fileInfo, settings, momentLocale, getCurrentTime, defaultMisspellings), custom lint commands.
src/rules-runner.ts.outputs: Transformed text string; executes custom Obsidian commands.
src/rules-runner.ts.should: Sequence rules with special-execution ordering, respect disabled rules, apply custom regexes, build per-run options.
src/rules-runner.ts.shouldNot: Touch the editor/DOM or read files from disk.
src/rules-runner.ts.side: Logging/timing; runs user custom commands via Obsidian command API.

src/option.ts.summary: Abstract Option class and concrete option types (Boolean/Text/TextArea/MomentFormat/Dropdown/MdFilePicker) plus DropdownRecord; each renders an Obsidian Setting control and persists changes to rule config.
src/option.ts.inputs: Language keys, default values, rule alias, containerEl, settings, plugin.
src/option.ts.outputs: Rendered setting controls; updated settings.ruleConfigs values.
src/option.ts.should: Display option UI, read/write its config key, hide/unhide, expose search info.
src/option.ts.shouldNot: Define rule transformation logic or the lint order.
src/option.ts.side: DOM creation, triggers plugin.saveSettings on change.

src/docs.ts.summary: Build-time script that generates README.md and per-rule-type docs markdown from the registered rules, their examples, and options.
src/docs.ts.inputs: Registered rules, doc template files, additional-info markdown files on disk.
src/docs.ts.should: Iterate rules, format examples/options tables, write documentation files.
src/docs.ts.shouldNot: Run at plugin runtime or affect linting behavior.

src/linter-error.ts.summary: LinterError Error subclass carrying an underlying cause and preserving the original stack.
src/linter-error.ts.should: Represent linting failures with a cause chain.

src/rules-registry.ts.summary: Barrel module whose single glob import (compiled by esbuild plugin) pulls in every rule file so each self-registers via RuleBuilder.register.
src/rules-registry.ts.outputs: Populated global rule registry as a side effect.

src/settings-data.ts.summary: Defines LinterSettings/CommonStyles types, AfterFileChangeLintTimes enum, and DEFAULT_SETTINGS defaults for the plugin.
src/settings-data.ts.outputs: Type definitions and default settings object.

src/translation-helper.ts.summary: Interactive CLI (readline) dev tool to add/list/replace/translate locale string keys, writing updated values back to locale source files.
src/translation-helper.ts.inputs: stdin prompts, locale maps, english key list.
src/translation-helper.ts.should: Drive translation workflows and persist locale edits.

src/rules/rule-builder.ts.summary: RuleBuilder framework: RuleBuilderBase (rule/builder maps, applyIfEnabled, no-setting-control tracking) and abstract RuleBuilder plus Example/Option builder classes used by every rule to construct a Rule and its options.
src/rules/rule-builder.ts.inputs: Builder subclass metadata (name/description keys, type, options, examples), settings, text, extraOptions.
src/rules/rule-builder.ts.outputs: Rule instances, [transformedText, isEnabled] tuples, built rule options objects.
src/rules/rule-builder.ts.should: Bridge declarative rule builders to Rule instances, apply enabled rules with option merging, register rules.
src/rules/rule-builder.ts.shouldNot: Render UI or perform file/editor I/O.

src/utils/logger.ts.summary: Logging wrapper over loglevel: leveled log functions, timing begin/end, optional collection of last-run logs, and log-level conversion helpers.
src/utils/logger.ts.inputs: Messages, timing keys, log level strings/numbers.
src/utils/logger.ts.outputs: Console log output, collected log array, formatted timings.
src/utils/logger.ts.should: Provide leveled/collected logging and timing utilities.
src/utils/logger.ts.side: Console output, mutates module-level log state.

src/utils/nested-keyof.ts.summary: NestedKeyOf recursive dotted-key type plus typed getString/getNumber/getBoolean accessors that resolve a dotted path (with '.'-key handling) within an object.
src/utils/nested-keyof.ts.inputs: An object and a dotted path string.
src/utils/nested-keyof.ts.outputs: The typed value at the path or null.
src/utils/nested-keyof.ts.should: Safely resolve nested string/number/boolean values by path.

src/utils/auto-correct-misspellings.ts.summary: Downloads the default misspellings markdown into the plugin dir (once) and reads it back, disabling the feature on failure.
src/utils/auto-correct-misspellings.ts.outputs: Written misspellings file; file contents string.
src/utils/auto-correct-misspellings.ts.should: Fetch/persist default misspellings and surface failures.
src/utils/auto-correct-misspellings.ts.side: Network request, vault adapter read/write/mkdir, Notice, logging.

src/utils/ignore-types.ts.summary: Defines IgnoreTypes (mdast/regex/function based) and ignoreListOfTypes, which replaces ignorable regions (code, yaml, links, tags, tables, custom-ignore, etc.) with placeholders, runs a transform, then restores them.
src/utils/ignore-types.ts.inputs: List of ignore types, text, transform function.
src/utils/ignore-types.ts.outputs: Transformed text with ignored regions preserved.
src/utils/ignore-types.ts.should: Protect regions from rule transforms via placeholder round-trip.

src/utils/regex.ts.summary: Central library of shared regexes (yaml, code blocks, links, tags, urls, tables, footnotes, callouts, quotes, checklists) plus small helpers to escape dollar signs/regex, strip wiki-link spacing, ensure table spacing, get first H1, and build linter-comment matchers.
src/utils/regex.ts.inputs: Text strings for the helper functions.
src/utils/regex.ts.should: Provide reusable patterns and simple string/regex utilities.
src/utils/regex.ts.side: Imports from mdast/strings; functions are pure.

src/utils/strings.ts.summary: Large string-manipulation toolkit: insert/replace-between, CR stripping, blank-line insertion around content/blockquotes, hashing, escape-char conversion, custom-replacement table parsing, markdown special-char escape/unescape, and misc counting/index helpers.
src/utils/strings.ts.should: Offer pure text utilities, especially empty-line normalization around blocks.
src/utils/strings.ts.shouldNot: Parse full markdown AST or do I/O.

src/utils/mdast.ts.summary: Markdown-AST utilities using micromark/mdast: parse-to-AST (LRU cached), position extraction, and transforms for footnotes (move/re-index), emphasis/bold consistency, line breaks, paragraph spacing, list indicators, links, math blocks, code-fence language/spacing, tables, and custom-ignore sections.
src/utils/mdast.ts.outputs: Transformed markdown text and position/table index lists.
src/utils/mdast.ts.should: Provide AST-backed structural markdown operations used by rules.
src/utils/mdast.ts.shouldNot: Handle settings, UI, or file I/O.
src/utils/mdast.ts.side: Mutates a module-level LRU parse cache; may throw on malformed footnotes.

src/utils/yaml.ts.summary: YAML frontmatter utilities: init/get/format YAML block, get/set/remove sections, parse/load via the yaml lib, array-format enums and formatting/splitting, tag/alias conversion, string escaping, and disabled-rules extraction.
src/utils/yaml.ts.inputs: YAML/frontmatter text, keys, values, array-format enums, escape chars.
src/utils/yaml.ts.outputs: Modified YAML strings, parsed documents/objects, string arrays, escaped values.
src/utils/yaml.ts.should: Encapsulate all YAML parsing/formatting for rules.
src/utils/yaml.ts.shouldNot: Know about Obsidian app state or run rules.
src/utils/yaml.ts.side: May throw on invalid delimiter; otherwise pure.

src/lang/helpers.ts.summary: Localization core: locale map of all imported locales, current-language state, setLanguage, getTextInLanguage (with English fallback), locale key existence check, and source-file path lookup.
src/lang/helpers.ts.inputs: Language code, dotted language string key.
src/lang/helpers.ts.outputs: Translated strings, boolean key checks, file paths.
src/lang/helpers.ts.should: Resolve UI/log text for the active language with fallback.
src/lang/helpers.ts.side: Mutates module-level current-language state; warns on missing locale.

src/lang/validation.ts.summary: Validation helpers for the translation-helper CLI: verify a language is known and that a selected key is valid English and not already translated.
src/lang/validation.ts.inputs: Language code, selected locale, language string key.
src/lang/validation.ts.shouldNot: Perform translation writes or runtime work.

src/cm6/rule-alias-suggester.ts.summary: RuleAliasSuggest EditorSuggest that autocompletes rule aliases within the frontmatter 'disabled rules' key, offering rule names/aliases and inserting them inline or as list items.
src/cm6/rule-alias-suggester.ts.inputs: Editor cursor/line/frontmatter content, plugin, rules list.
src/cm6/rule-alias-suggester.ts.outputs: Suggestion trigger info, filtered suggestions, editor replacement text.
src/cm6/rule-alias-suggester.ts.should: Detect the disabled-rules context and suggest non-disabled rule aliases.
src/cm6/rule-alias-suggester.ts.side: Editor text replacement; DOM for suggestion rendering.

src/ui/helpers.ts.summary: Small DOM helpers to hide/unhide an element via a CSS class and to set element content as HTML fragment or plain text.
src/ui/helpers.ts.should: Toggle visibility class and inject text/HTML.

src/ui/icons.ts.summary: Holds inline Lucide SVG icon sources and exports iconInfo mapping semantic names to {id, source} used for addIcon and setIcon.
src/ui/icons.ts.shouldNot: Register icons or render UI itself.

src/ui/settings.ts.summary: SettingTab (PluginSettingTab) building the settings UI: creates the General/rule-type/Custom/Debug tabs, the search bar and zero-state, and manages tab selection and search mode.
src/ui/settings.ts.outputs: Rendered settings DOM; tab navigation state.
src/ui/settings.ts.should: Assemble and switch between setting tabs and drive search.
src/ui/settings.ts.shouldNot: Define option persistence or rule logic directly.

src/ui/components/base-setting.ts.summary: Abstract BaseSetting for generic (non-rule) settings: reads/writes a dotted settings key with defaults from DEFAULT_SETTINGS, typed getters, name/description rendering, and save via plugin.
src/ui/components/base-setting.ts.inputs: Container, name/description keys, settings key, plugin, optional beforeSave.
src/ui/components/base-setting.ts.should: Provide shared read/write/save scaffolding for generic setting controls.
src/ui/components/base-setting.ts.shouldNot: Define a specific control type (subclasses do).

src/ui/components/toggle-setting.ts.summary: ToggleSetting BaseSetting subclass rendering an Obsidian toggle for a boolean settings key, with optional onChange and hide/unhide.
src/ui/components/toggle-setting.ts.inputs: Container, name/desc keys, settings key, plugin, onChange.
src/ui/components/toggle-setting.ts.should: Bind a boolean setting to a toggle control.

src/ui/components/dropdown-setting.ts.summary: DropdownSetting BaseSetting subclass rendering a dropdown from enum-based or value/description record info and saving the selected string.
src/ui/components/dropdown-setting.ts.inputs: Container, name/desc keys, settings key, plugin, DropdownRecordInfo, beforeSave.
src/ui/components/dropdown-setting.ts.should: Populate and persist a dropdown-backed setting.

src/ui/components/number-input-setting.t.summary: NumberInputSetting BaseSetting subclass rendering a numeric text input bound to a number settings key.
src/ui/components/number-input-setting.t.inputs: Container, name/desc keys, settings key, plugin.
src/ui/components/number-input-setting.t.outputs: Rendered number input; saved parsed integer.
src/ui/components/number-input-setting.t.should: Bind a numeric setting to a number input.

src/ui/components/text-box-full.ts.summary: TextBoxFull renders a full-width (usually disabled) textarea with name/description and a hover copy-to-clipboard button; used to display config/log text.
src/ui/components/text-box-full.ts.inputs: Container, name, description, disabled flag; textarea value.
src/ui/components/text-box-full.ts.should: Display read-only text with copy support.
src/ui/components/text-box-full.ts.side: DOM; clipboard write; Notice on failure.

src/ui/components/add-custom-row.ts.summary: Abstract AddCustomRow base for list-style settings with a name/description/warning and an add-button that appends entries; subclasses implement showInputEls.
src/ui/components/add-custom-row.ts.outputs: Rendered header/add button and input container.
src/ui/components/add-custom-row.ts.should: Provide add/reset scaffolding for repeatable custom rows.

src/ui/components/add-custom-refreshable.summary: Abstract AddCustomRefreshableRow like AddCustomRow but also renders a refresh button invoking an async onRefresh; used for the auto-correct file picker.
src/ui/components/add-custom-refreshable.inputs: Container, texts, app, saveSettings, onAddInput, onRefresh.
src/ui/components/add-custom-refreshable.outputs: Rendered header/add+refresh buttons and input container.
src/ui/components/add-custom-refreshable.should: Provide add/refresh/reset scaffolding for repeatable rows.
src/ui/components/add-custom-refreshable.side: DOM mutation; triggers async refresh callback.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: Abstract Tab base for settings tabs: builds nav button with icon/label and content container, tracks searchable setting info, and toggles display for selection/search modes.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.inputs: Nav/settings els, tab name, mobile flag, plugin; search info entries.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.should: Provide tab shell, icon/name mapping, and show/hide behavior.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: GeneralTab renders general plugin settings: lint-on-save/file-change toggles and dependent notices, locale override, YAML alias/tag/escape common-style controls, math dollar-sign count, and folder/file ignore options.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.outputs: Rendered general settings controls with search info.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.should: Compose general settings using shared setting components.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.shouldNot: Persist values directly beyond the components/plugin.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: RuleTab renders one settings tab per rule type, listing each rule with a linked heading and displaying its Option controls, hiding sub-options when the rule is disabled.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.inputs: Nav/settings els, rule-type name, rules array, plugin.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.outputs: Rendered per-rule option controls and search info.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.should: Display rule options and initial hidden state.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: CustomTab renders the Custom settings tab hosting the custom command and custom regex-replace list options.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.outputs: Rendered custom command/replace option UIs with search info.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: DebugTab renders debug settings: log-level dropdown, read-only config JSON box, log-collection toggle, and a read-only last-run logs box.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.inputs: Nav/settings els, plugin, loglevel keys, collected logs.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.outputs: Rendered debug controls and displayed config/logs.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.should: Expose logging configuration and diagnostic text.

src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.summary: TabSearcher renders the settings search input and filters each tab's settings/options by name/description/alias/option values, toggling visibility and headings and a zero-state.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.inputs: Container, zero-state el, tab map, focus callback; search query.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.outputs: Rendered search bar; visibility changes across settings.
src/ui/linter-components/tab-components/.should: Search and show/hide matching settings across tabs.

src/ui/modals/lint-confirmation-modal.ts.summary: LintConfirmationModal confirms bulk lint (all files/folder) actions with an optional custom-command warning and a submit action.
src/ui/modals/lint-confirmation-modal.ts.inputs: App, message/button texts, submit action, warning flag.
src/ui/modals/lint-confirmation-modal.ts.outputs: Rendered modal; invokes submit action on confirm.
src/ui/modals/lint-confirmation-modal.ts.should: Warn and gate destructive bulk-lint operations.
src/ui/modals/lint-confirmation-modal.ts.side: DOM; Notice; runs provided async action.

src/ui/modals/confirm-rule-disable-modal.summary: ConfirmRuleDisableModal prompts the user to confirm disabling a conflicting rule when enabling another, with submit/cancel callbacks.
src/ui/modals/confirm-rule-disable-modal.inputs: App, rule name keys, submit/cancel actions.

src/ui/modals/parse-results-modal.ts.summary: ParseResultsModal displays the parsed find/replace pairs from a custom auto-correct file, or a warning when none were found.

src/ui/suggesters/suggest.ts.summary: Generic popup suggestion infrastructure: Suggest (keyboard/mouse selection over rendered items) and abstract TextInputSuggest wiring a Popper-positioned suggestion dropdown to an input element.
src/ui/suggesters/suggest.ts.inputs: Owner, input element, app scope; input string.
src/ui/suggesters/suggest.ts.side: DOM; keymap scope push/pop; Popper instance.

src/ui/suggesters/command-suggester.ts.summary: CommandSuggester TextInputSuggest over Obsidian commands, filtering by id/name and excluding already-selected commands, setting a commandId attribute on select.
src/ui/suggesters/command-suggester.ts.inputs: App, input element, commands to exclude; input string.
src/ui/suggesters/command-suggester.ts.outputs: Filtered Command suggestions; input value + commandId.
src/ui/suggesters/command-suggester.ts.should: Suggest Obsidian commands for custom lint commands.

src/ui/suggesters/folder-suggester.ts.summary: FolderSuggester TextInputSuggest over vault folder paths, excluding already-selected folders and matching by substring.
src/ui/suggesters/folder-suggester.ts.inputs: App, input element, folders to exclude; input string.
src/ui/suggesters/folder-suggester.ts.should: Suggest vault folders for ignore settings.

src/ui/suggesters/md-file-suggester.ts.summary: MdFileSuggester TextInputSuggest over vault markdown file paths, excluding already-selected files and matching by substring.
src/ui/suggesters/md-file-suggester.ts.inputs: App, input element, files to exclude; input string.
src/ui/suggesters/md-file-suggester.ts.should: Suggest markdown files for the auto-correct file picker.

src/ui/linter-components/custom-command-.summary: CustomCommandOption (AddCustomRow) renders the editable list of custom lint commands with a command search, reorder/delete buttons, and enable toggle.
src/ui/linter-components/custom-command-.should: Manage the custom-command list UI and persistence.

src/ui/linter-components/custom-replace-.summary: CustomReplaceOption (AddCustomRow) renders the editable list of custom regex replacements (label/find/flags/replace) with reorder/delete and enable toggle.
src/ui/linter-components/custom-replace-.should: Manage the custom-regex list UI and persistence.

src/ui/linter-components/files-to-ignore.summary: FilesToIgnoreOption (AddCustomRow) renders the editable list of file-ignore regexes (label/match/flags) with delete buttons.
src/ui/linter-components/files-to-ignore.should: Manage the files-to-ignore list UI and persistence.

src/ui/linter-components/folder-ignore-o.summary: FolderIgnoreOption (AddCustomRow) renders the editable list of ignored folders using a folder suggester, with delete buttons.
src/ui/linter-components/folder-ignore-o.should: Manage the folders-to-ignore list UI and persistence.

src/ui/linter-components/auto-correct-fi.summary: AutoCorrectFilesPickerOption (AddCustomRefreshableRow) renders the list of custom misspelling files via an md-file suggester, parses each file's replacements, offers a results modal, and refreshes all parsed content.
src/ui/linter-components/auto-correct-fi.inputs: Container, filesPicked array, app, saveSettings, name/description keys.
src/ui/linter-components/auto-correct-fi.outputs: Rendered file-picker rows; parsed customReplacements maps.
src/ui/linter-components/auto-correct-fi.should: Manage custom auto-correct file selection and parsing.
src/ui/linter-components/auto-correct-fi.side: DOM; vault file reads; mutates settings; saveSettings.
